* Source: Headset (USB-C to 3.5mm Headphone Jack Adapter), no input selected, L, volume: no control. Timing signal peak level -26.0 dBFS, measurement signal peak level -21.7 dBFS

*  C-weighting compensation: Off
*  Target level: 75.0 dB
